## Summary

Describe the proposed governance change in one short paragraph.

## Affected Areas

- [ ] Manifesto article
- [ ] Technical governance addendum
- [ ] Proposal
- [ ] Constitution or bylaw
- [ ] Architecture or contributor documentation
- [ ] Workflow or validation script

## Rationale

Explain the problem this change solves.

## Governance Path

- Ratifying body:
- Threshold:
- Effective date:
- Status on merge: Draft / Proposed / Provisionally Adopted / Ratified

## Review Gates

- Charter review needed: Yes / No
- Economic impact considered: Yes / No
- Environmental impact considered: Yes / No
- Policy consistency impact: Low / Medium / High

## Versioning

- Proposed version bump: Major / Minor / Patch / None
- `CHANGELOG.md` updated: Yes / No
- `VERSION` updated: Yes / No

## Checklist

- [ ] The text is internally consistent with the repository structure.
- [ ] Required headings were preserved.
- [ ] Cross-links were updated where needed.
- [ ] Charter or constitutional implications were considered.
- [ ] Measurable outcomes or validation targets were updated where relevant.
